source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Inter for quiet inventory operations, IBM Plex Mono for SKUs, counts, and token labels, and Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese navigation, forms, search, and status text.
layout: Dense but calm inventory dashboards, shell-ridge dividers, snout-pointer focus rings, compact stock tables, measured forms, command search, 8px radii, matte parchment surfaces, leaf-green operational states, and low soft shadows.

prompts.label: Transparent weevil motif
prompts.workflow: Built-in image generation on a flat #ff00ff chroma-key background, then local chroma-key removal to transparent RGBA PNG.
prompts.prompt: Use case: photorealistic-natural. Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout chroma-key source. Primary request: Create only an isolated weevil with a prominent elongated curved snout for a design-system catalog. No environment, no props, no text. Subject: A single forest leaf weevil shown in accurate macro detail: matte warm brown and deep umber ridged shell, acorn tan speckling, dark beadlike eyes, long narrow rostrum/snout, bent antennae, small jointed legs, subtle dry-leaf surface texture. Natural insect anatomy, crisp silhouette, calm inventory-management-system mood: precise, catalogable, organized, tactile. Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the full insect, snout, antennae, legs, and body without cropping. Slight three-quarter side view with the snout clearly readable and enough empty space around the antennae and feet for background removal. Lighting/mood: clean diffuse studio light preserving matte brown shell texture, acorn tan ridges, deep umber shadows, and quiet leaf-forest naturalism. Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff, pink, purple, or magenta anywhere in the subject. Constraints: no leaf, no branch, no acorn, no forest scene, no second insect, no cartoon style, no toy look, no text, no watermark, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection, no colored rim light, no key-color spill.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt: Use case: ui-mockup. Asset type: Morphous Weevil light-mode design-system board. Input image role: The visible transparent weevil motif is the source reference for palette, texture rhythm, contrast, radius, spacing, product mood, and component details. Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Weevil", derived from the visible matte brown long-snouted forest weevil cutout. Canvas: exact wide landscape 16:9 composition, 3840 x 2160 4K-class board. Resolution and legibility: high-resolution source board, large readable labels, no dense tiny token tables, no tiny paragraph blocks. Required visible sections: Morphous Weevil, Weevil, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows. Reference use: Extract palette and UI language from the weevil's matte brown ridged shell, acorn tan speckling, dark umber snout and eyes, bark-like grooves, dry leaf texture, and muted forest leaf green context. Palette mood: matte brown, leaf green, acorn tan. Design mood: inventory management system. UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command palette search, sidebar navigation, top navigation, inventory dashboard metric cards, stock-level charts, filters, SKU list, status chips, empty/loading/error/success states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, and simple product icons. Design language: quiet operational SaaS UI for repeated inventory work; compact but organized information density; shell-ridge table dividers; snout-pointer focus rings; acorn-tan surfaces; leaf-green availability and receiving states; umber borders; matte paper backgrounds; tactile grooved texture swatches. Keep all component and card radii 8px or less. Do not put cards inside cards. Typography: include English product UI guidance and Japanese typography examples using readable labels such as "日本語タイポグラフィ", "検索", "在庫", "状態", "保存". Pair a practical grotesk sans for operations UI with Noto Sans JP-style Japanese guidance and a crisp mono for SKUs and tabular data. Color constraints: use only motif-derived matte browns, acorn tans, muted leaf greens, bark umbers, and near-neutrals; no generic purple/blue gradients, no unrelated bright colors, no one-note brown theme. Text constraints: no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Weevil" or "Weevil", no lorem ipsum, no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt: Use case: ui-mockup. Asset type: Morphous Weevil dark-mode design-system board. Input image roles: The visible transparent weevil motif is the motif reference, and the visible light-mode board is the layout, section coverage, palette, typography, and component-language reference. Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Weevil". It must feel like the same visible light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible matte brown long-snouted weevil motif. Canvas: exact wide landscape 16:9 composition, 3840 x 2160 4K-class board. Resolution and legibility: high-resolution source board, large readable labels, no dense tiny token tables, no tiny paragraph blocks. Required visible sections: Morphous Weevil, Weevil, Dark Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows. Visual details: dark background from the weevil's deepest umber snout, eye, and shell grooves; foreground from acorn tan and dry parchment highlights; primary actions from warm ridged brown; secondary surfaces from bark brown and lichen-gray neutrals; leaf green for available, receiving, and healthy stock states; amber-tan for low-stock states; restrained red-brown for destructive states. Use subtle shell-ridge texture overlays, dry leaf grain, matte inventory panels, snout-pointer focus rings, and crisp operational controls. UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search, navigation, inventory dashboard data charts, stock tables, forms, empty/loading/error/success states, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, and shadows. Design constraints: shadcn/tweakcn-style product UI, quiet inventory management system, compact dashboard density, 8px or smaller radii, no nested UI cards, no marketing hero layout. Typography: include English product UI guidance and Japanese examples such as "日本語タイポグラフィ", "検索", "在庫", "状態", "保存" with Noto Sans JP-style readable Japanese and mono SKU/data samples. Color constraints: use only motif-derived matte browns, acorn tans, muted leaf greens, bark umbers, and near-neutrals; no neon colors, no pure black flat background, no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no one-note brown theme. Text constraints: no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Weevil" or "Weevil", no lorem ipsum, no tiny unreadable paragraphs.
